DECLARATION OF JASON M HOWELL IN SUPPORT OF PLAINTIFF CONCENTRIX EUROPE LIMITEDS MOTION FOR AN ORDER SEALING CONFIDENTIAL DOCUMENTS (TRANSACTION ID # 61425944) FILED BY PLAINTIFF CONCENTRIX EUROPE LIMITED

LAW AND MOTION 302, PLAINTIFF CONCENTRIX EUROPE LIMITED'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER SEALING CONFIDENTIAL DOCUMENTS IS DENIED. A PRIVATE CONFIDENTIALITY AGREEMENT DOES NOT NECESSARILY RISE TO THE LEVEL OF AN "OVERRIDING INTEREST" PER CRC 2.550. PLAINTIFF HAS NOT MADE A SUFFICIENT SHOWING THAT THERE IS AN OVERRIDING INTEREST OR THAT IT IS UNABLE TO REQUEST A DEFAULT JUDGMENT WITHOUT PUBLICLY DISCLOSING TRULY CONFIDENTIAL AND BUSINESS SENSITIVE INFORMATION. COUNSEL FOR PLAINTIFF IS TO PREPARE AND SUBMIT A PROPOSED ORDER WHICH REPEATS VERBATIM THE SUBSTANTIVE PORTION OF THE COURT'S RULING AND COMPLIES WITH CRC 3.1312. JUDGE: HAROLD KAHN; CLERK: G. GONZALES; NOT REPORTED.

calendar.matters:
CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Aug-09-2018 Off Calendar

Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-26-2018 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: This matter came on calendar this day for Default Prove-Up as to defendant Aliphcom, Inc., dba Jawbone. At the last calling of the case, the Court informed Nadim G. Hegazi, Esq., counsel for plaintiff Concentrix Europe Limited, that if further documentation regarding attorney fees was received prior to today's hearing, the matter would be submitted on the papers without a hearing. The Supplemental Declaration of Nadim G. Hagazi in support of Attorney Fees and Costs for Default Judgment was received by the Court yesterday, July 25th.

Dept. 514. Judge: Leslie C. Nichols. Clerk: Kevin Dougherty. Proceedings Not Reported. No Appearances.

Plaintiff's complaint for breach of contract was filed on 2/8/17 and service on 3/7/17.
The default of Aliphcom, Inc., dba Jawbone, was entered on 6/22/17.
DOES 1-50 were dismissed on October 25, 2017.

Good cause appearing, the Court rules in favor of Plaintiff Concentrix Europe Limited, and against the Defaulted Defendant Aliphcom, Inc., dba Jawbone,, as follows:

Damages - $612,348.54.
Prejudgment Interest - $91,560.65.
Attorney Fees - $17,500.00.
Costs - $450.00.

Total - $721,859.19.

Proposed Judgment was submitted to and signed by the Court.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-06-2018 Continued To Aug-29-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Default Judgment Prove-Up Hearing
Off Calendar Jul-12-2018 Continued To Jul-26-18 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 514

Application For Prove Up Hearing In Support Of Request For Default Judgment And Scheduling Of Court Reporter

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-23-2018 Continued To Jul-25-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

Plaintiff Concentrix Europe Limiteds Notice Of Motion And Motion For An Order Sealing Confidential Documents
Off Calendar Jan-03-2018 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES:
No appearance.

RULING: There being no appearance or objection, the Court adopted the tentative ruling. PLAINTIFF CONCENTRIX EUROPE LIMITED'S Motion For An Order Sealing Confidential Documents is DENIED. A private confidentiality agreement does not necessarily rise to the level of an "overriding interest" per CRC 2.550. Plaintiff has not made a sufficient showing that there is an overriding interest or that it is unable to request a default judgment without publicly disclosing truly confidential and business sensitive information.

Counsel for plaintiff is to prepare and submit a proposed order which repeats verbatim the substantive portion of the court's ruling and complies with CRC 3.1312. Judge: Harold Kahn; Clerk: G. Gonzales; Not reported.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Oct-23-2017 Continued To May-09-18 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-26-2017 Continued To Nov-08-17 At 10:30 A.M. In Dept 610
